title: 12 x Bath Sponge for Adults - Exfoliating Body Shower Scrubber for Men Women Kids Children - One Smooth Side - One Rough Side to Exfoliate (12)
features: Colours may vary - set of 12 x Bath sponges. Great gift for everyone for Valentines Day, Fathers, Mothers, Christmas, Thank you, Friends, Family and much more
Luxuriously Rich Lather! Soft yet Sturdy Feel for Gentle Scrubbing! A Real Handful of foamy bubbles!! The large size of Foam Body Sponge gives you more to hold onto and more sudsy washing coverage!
Looking Good! Sturdy Sponge, no rope for Hanging! The sponge-look and style makes shower or bath time feel lovely - beachy! Great for Bathing, Soaking, etc.
Tastefully Designed - Made in the United Kingdom with High-Quality material, Solid Construction - these foam sponges are durable and dependable
We Care about Your Satisfaction! BAYTRADE is a brand you can trust! Buy with confidence knowing that If You're not Satisfied, We'll Make it Right - Reach Out to Us
description: Product description Take these great sponges with you on holiday or use them at home. They are amazing for bath time or even during / after a bath soak with bath bomb and salts to exfoliate all the dead skin away, leaving your skin feel clean and buttery They can also come in handy while cleaning your home as they are colour coded, use some in the kitchen for dishes, some to clean your bathroom and some for you in the shower. However you want to enjoy your sponges we want you to know we have your satisfaction in mind always Directions 1. Wet the sponge, 2. Apply body wash or soap, 3. Gently rub the sponge on your skin, 4. Rinse off with water Safety Warning Use the sponge gently to avoid any irritation or discomfort. See more
